creator: krasi_e_d@yahoo.com
text:
Hello, 

Everybody, I am new to FreeBSD and today I attempted to configure the gbde. I just supplemented the following line to the GENERIC kernel:

options GEOM_BDE

After reboot I saw that the sshd doesn't work.I cant use root or any user on the computer.I saw new line like sshd error:Bind to port 22 on 0.0.0.0 failed.
I attempted all boot options like (default, ACPI disabled,Safe mode,single user mode,verbose prompt) to change the kernel configuration file. Because after the new line for GEOM_BDE my problems came.
I'll be happy if some one find some time to answer with few instructions.
